name: redpen
description: Scott red-pens your diff before it ships — catching the embarrassing leftovers (debug output, TODOs, placeholder junk, stray secrets, test artifacts) that were only ever meant for you.

interface.shortDescription: Scott red-pens your diff before it ships
interface.longDescription: A calm, veteran reviewer who circles the embarrassing leftovers in your diff — debug output, notes-to-self, placeholder junk, hardcoded local values, stray secrets, test artifacts — before they reach production.
defaultPrompt: Red-pen my diff before I ship.
